sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34386" key="e)/mplegma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμπλεγ-μα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n34386.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plait</tr_>: <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐ. γυναικεῖα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.83</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
